source.title: ARRI LogC4 Logarithmic Color Space Specification

notes: Constants quoted from the reference implementation (page 10): a = (2^18 - 16) / 117.45; b = (1023 - 95) / 1023; c = 95 / 1023; s = (7 * ln(2) * 2^(7 - 14*c/b)) / (a*b); t = (2^(14*(-c/b) + 6) - 64) / a. Encode (x >= t): (log2(a*x + 64) - 6) / 14 * b + c; below t the curve is linear through s and t. Decode: (2^(14*(in - c)/b + 6) - 64) / a. Value table quoted from page 11.

vectors.name: hardware_max
vectors.quote: ARRI LogC4 Hardware Max 1.0000 -> Relative Scene Linear 469.80
